cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates are selected based on highest scores from the shortlist, ensuring they include the most frequent digits in key positions (notably 4 and 3 in position 1, 6 and 5 in position 2, 9 and 3 in position 3). The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers, and the top50 maintain this ranking order while avoiding duplicates.
